meta.title: Instagram to Profitable Brand — Dataset
meta.description: All chart data lives here. Fetched by script.js in Phase 2.

myths.myth: You need 100K followers to make money
myths.stat: Engagement rate is 4x more valuable than raw follower count for brand deals

myths.myth: Posting every day grows your account
myths.stat: Algorithm weights saves and shares, not posting frequency

myths.myth: Brand deals are the main income stream
myths.reality: Top creators earn 60–70% from own products — not brand deals
myths.stat: Your own product is an asset; brand deals are freelance income

myths.reality: Viral posts bring off-niche followers who don't convert
myths.stat: Retention rate of viral followers is typically under 15%
